forumEn: Hong Kong Court of Final Appeal
decisionType: 派生诉讼与不公平损害
issuesZh: 公司损失与个人救济区分
issuesEn: distinction between company loss and personal relief
holdingZh: Re Chime 讨论了派生诉讼与不公平损害救济之间的边界，强调针对公司本身受损的主张通常应通过公司或派生诉讼路径提出。
holdingEn: Re Chime explored the boundary between derivative actions and unfair-prejudice relief, stressing that claims for wrongs done to the company should generally be pursued by or on behalf of the company.
